Appearances:
Plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation is present. Represented by Jeff McCormick.
Attorney John P. Zanghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jon Hendricks, Jr. is present.
Attorney Joshua D. N. Hess representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Jim Weixel, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled per plaintiff's attorney, the trial date of NOV-7-2011 is vacated.
